title: Senior Teacher - Mahendra's Institute - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Mahendra's Institute - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
